      "text": "Un wiꞥſch pagaïdtja wehl

"

    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas notikke festâfimtâ

    {
      "n": 14,

"

    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad runnaja DEews ar

"

    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Iseij no ta Schkirsta / tu

"

    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiﬀi Swehri/ kas ar tew

"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad isgahje Noûs un win-

"

    {
      "n": 21,

      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fa-ohde
